description: Files introduced or deleted on V1 main AFTER the audit-base commit. R10 proves files@cutCandidate == surviving mapped files + these additions - evidence-backed deletions. Every post-audit file (incl. the validator + these planning docs) MUST appear here or in the path-map before the cut.
